seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Marble Bar and Marchagee. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Marble Bar vs Marchagee: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marble Bar and Marchagee.
heading: Marble Bar vs Marchagee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marble Bar, Western Australia and Marchagee, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marble Bar has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Marchagee (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marble Bar or Marchagee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marble Bar has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Marchagee scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marble Bar scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Marchagee scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marble Bar or Marchagee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marble Bar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
